subject: Fw: interpretation of statutei
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Alan Dershowitz <dersh@law.harvard.edu>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <JEEProject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, June 28, 2007 1:58:42 PM
Subject: Fw: interpretation of statutei


I'm going to simplify and shorten and make it more directly relevant to our case and then run it by steve.  We should all suggesst changes before I go back to steve.  

Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless

-----Original Message-----From: "Steven Pinker" <pinker@wjh.harvard.edu>

Date: Thu, 28 Jun 2007 16:14:35 
To:"'Alan Dershowitz'" <dersh@law.harvard.edu>
Subject: interpretation of statute


Dear Alan,
 
I found it was just as easy to put my analysis in a letter as in an email, so I’ve attached it. I hope it helps – I agree that your interpretation is the only natural one. Let me know if there’s anything else I can do. 
 
Best,
Steve

Sent: Thursday, June 28, 2007 1:58:42 PM
Subject: Fw: interpretation of statutei

I'm going to simplify and shorten and make it more directly relevant to our case and then run it by steve. We should all suggesst changes before I go back to steve.

Sent via BlackBerry from Cingular Wireless

-----Original Message-----From: "Steven Pinker" pinker@wjh.harvard.edu

Date: Thu, 28 Jun 2007 16:14:35
To:"'Alan Dershowitz'" dersh@law.harvard.edu
Subject: interpretation of statute

Dear Alan,

I found it was just as easy to put my analysis in a letter as in an email, so I’ve attached it. I hope it helps – I agree that your interpretation is the only natural one. Let me know if there’s anything else I can do.

Best,
Steve
